name: federation-registry-ops
summary: Help agents inspect registry sources, federation rules, mirror behavior, and audit or inventory exports inside infinitas-skill.
author: lvxiaoer
use_when: Need to debug federated registry source, mirror, or namespace behavior
Need to inspect inventory export or audit export artifacts
avoid_when: Need to publish a new release from source
Need to install a skill into a runtime directory
runtime_assumptions: config/registry-sources.json and generated catalog exports are available
The task is about registry operations inside infinitas-skill rather than a generic Git repository
